challenge.title: Korak 16
challenge.description:
Ispod elementa h2 na drugoj kartici, dodaj element p sa ovim tekstom:

This is the story of Dave as he learns to cook everything from pancakes to pasta, one recipe at a time.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
XYZ Bookstore

Browse our collection of amazing books!

Sally's SciFi Adventure

This is an epic story of Sally and her dog Rex as they navigate through other worlds.

Dave's Cooking Adventure

tests.text: Trebalo bi da imaš element p postavljen unutar drugog elementa sa klasom card.
Tekst elementa p na vašoj drugoj kartici treba da bude This is the story of Dave as he learns to cook everything from pancakes to pasta, one recipe at a time.
tests.testString:
const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.card');
assert.equal(cards[1]?.querySelector('p')?.innerText.trim(), "This is the story of Dave as he learns to cook everything from pancakes to pasta, one recipe at a time.");

tests.text: Element p na vašoj drugoj kartici trebalo bi da bude ispod elementa h2.
